items.title: Ja on the Blazers' guard-heavy roster: "I think all those guys will most likely unlock new parts of my game and I feel like I can do the same for them. I feel like we’re all unselfish and the ultimate goal is to win."
items.author: Sean Highkin
items.body_excerpt:
Ja on the Blazers' guard-heavy roster: "I think all those guys will most likely unlock new parts of my game and I feel like I can do the same for them. I feel like we’re all unselfish and the ultimate goal is to win."

Also says he doesn't care if he starts or comes off the bench

items.title: The Lakers are 2-0 in Vegas
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
The Lakers are 2-0 in Vegas

Final score: Lakers 91, Mavericks 70

Arthur Kaluma: 34 points, 11/16 FGs, 6/10 3s, 3/3 FTs. 
Rest of Lakers starters: 27 points, 9/27 FGs, 0/6 3s

Robbie Avila didn't play

Next up for Lakers: Tuesday vs Clippers
